check.command: awk '!/^[[:space:]]*#/ && NF >= 4 && ($3 ~ /^(vfat|exfat|iso9660|udf|ntfs|msdos)$/ || $2 ~ "^/(media|mnt)/") { ok=0; n=split($4, opts, ","); for (i=1; i<=n; i++) if (opts[i] == "nodev") ok=1; if (!ok) print }' /etc/fstab

candidate_check.description: OL 9 must prevent special devices on file systems that are used with removable media.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify that OL 9 file systems that are used for removable media are mounted with the "nodev" option with the following command:

$ more /etc/fstab
UUID=2bc871e4-e2a3-4f29-9ece-3be60c835222 /mnt/usbflash vfat noauto,owner,ro,nosuid,nodev,noexec 0 0

If a file system found in "/etc/fstab" refers to removable media and it does not have the "nodev" option set, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the "/etc/fstab" to use the "nodev" option on file systems that are associated with removable media.
title: OL 9 must prevent special devices on file systems that are used with removable media.
